title: The Hobbit
author: J.R.R. Tolkien
description: The Hobbit by J.R.R. Tolkien is a classic fantasy adventure following Bilbo Baggins, a home-loving hobbit who is recruited by the wizard Gandalf and a group of thirteen dwarves, led by Thorin Oakenshield.

title: Holly
author: Stephen King
description: Holly by Stephen King is a 2023 thriller focusing on private investigator Holly Gibney as she investigates the disappearance of Bonnie Dahl in 2021.

title: War and Peace
author: Leo Tolstoy
description: War and Peace by Leo Tolstoy is an epic novel chronicling the lives of five Russian aristocratic families during the Napoleonic Wars and the 1812 French invasion of Russia.

title: Percy Jackson & the Lightning Thief
author: Rick Riordan
description: Percy Jackson & the Lightning Thief is a middle-grade fantasy novel by Rick Riordan that follows 12-year-old Percy Jackson, who discovers he is a demigod son of Poseidon.
